description: A guest realizes they have two loyalty accounts under different email addresses and wants to merge them.

nodes.task_description: Look up both accounts and verify the guest's identity for both.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent finds both accounts and confirms they belong to the same person.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the account merge process in the loyalty system.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent uses the merge tool.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that all points and stay history have been successfully transferred to the primary account.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent verifies the merge was successful and the new point total is correct.
